steps_to_reproduce: Trace the data source used by each root and compare it with ContentRepository.shared.items
expected_behavior: Every surface projects the same canonical ContentItem collection
actual_behavior: Guide, Search and Map still use legacy screen-specific models while canonical repository APIs exist separately
proposed_fix: Make ContentRepository the input of every root projection; keep legacy route adapters only at the detail boundary
evidence: RootGuideView has no guideItems call; SearchView has no searchContent call; root Map has no mapItems call

actual_behavior: Search combines directResultsCache, popularQuestions, displayedResults and multiple feature datasets
proposed_fix: Replace result assembly with one canonical ContentSearchResult pipeline and typed presentation adapters

steps_to_reproduce: Run scripts/content-text-audit.py and group normalized literal text
expected_behavior: Repeated copy is represented by a localization key or canonical content reference
actual_behavior: 9,333 issue rows contain exact repeated text; many are harmless UI labels, but content copies remain mixed with labels
proposed_fix: Separate UI-label duplication from content-body duplication; canonicalize body groups before release

steps_to_reproduce: Group duplicate text occurrences by recommended category
expected_behavior: One canonical item has one primary category and optional repeated presentation
actual_behavior: 2,278 repeated-text occurrences span inferred category contexts
proposed_fix: Resolve each group to one canonical item ID and replace secondary storage with references

expected_behavior: No unresolved duplicate normalized title/body warnings
actual_behavior: Validator supports these checks, but the current runner stalled before metrics were printed
proposed_fix: Export validationIssues to the coverage artifact in a deterministic build-time test

expected_behavior: Saved persistence and navigation are canonical-ID based
actual_behavior: Persistence is canonical, but a large legacy destination enum and fallback data lookups remain
proposed_fix: Migrate existing payload once, then remove legacy destination copies after coverage reaches zero
